text: User asked: mujhe paneer tikka aur butter naan khana pasand hai -> Xyran replied: {"action": "answer", "message": "Achha, aapko paneer tikka aur butter naan pasand hai. Bahut badhiya!"}
User asked: aaj bahar bahut achha lag raha hai -> Xyran replied: {"action": "answer", "message": "Haan, aaj mausam bahut suhana lag raha hai."}
User asked: mujhe khana kya pasand hai? -> Xyran replied: {"action": "answer", "message": "Aapko paneer tikka aur butter naan khana pasand hai."}
